title: Headwinds For Capesizes
summary:
Main
The mid-sized dry bulk segments propelled the Baltic Dry Index higher last week, while the capesizes faced headwinds amid weaker demand. Among the commodities, iron ore and base metals remained under pressure amid continued concerns over the demand outlook. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
The new week has begun with yet another batch of mixed Chinese economic data.
